title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 54.130 - Shall report receipts and expenditures to commission
text:
54.130.  Shall report receipts and expenditures to commission. — As often and in such manner as may be required by the commission, he shall furnish an account of the receipts and expenditures of the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13813) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12151; 1919 § 9549; 1909 § 3770 
Depositaries, transfer of funds, liability of treasurer, 110.170 
Report monthly to county auditor, certain counties, 55.200 
Settlement with county commission, 49.260
